p.strong: O(P×S + R×P) where P=threads, S=slots, R=retired nodes

div.p: A node is freed IFF it was not in any hazard slot at the snapshot instant. This creates a happens-before edge:
Thread A: protect(node) → dereference(node) ↓ (release) Thread B: scan() → see hp==node → skip free ↓ (acquire) Thread B: scan() → see hp!=node → free(node)
By transitivity: Thread A's dereference happens-before Thread B's free, ensuring safety.

g.text: free(node); // ← Safe: no HP references this node

text.tspan: // ← Safe: no HP references this node
// Result: Thread B's scan HAPPENS-AFTER Thread A's protect
// Therefore: if Thread B sees hp != node, Thread A's
// dereference must have completed before Thread B frees
// Result: Thread B's scan HAPPENS-AFTER Thread A's protect
// Therefore: if Thread B sees hp != node, Thread A's
// dereference must have completed before Thread B frees
// - O(P log P + R log P) vs O(R × P)
// OPT 2: Hash Table for Protected Set
// - Falls back to full check on positive
// - O(P log P + R log P) vs O(R × P)
// OPT 2: Hash Table for Protected Set
// - Falls back to full check on positive
